# pfsense_interface_group (Data Source)

Retrieves a single [interface group](https://docs.netgate.com/pfsense/en/latest/interfaces/groups.html) by name. Interface groups allow applying firewall rules to multiple interfaces at once.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "pfsense_interface_group" "example" {
  name = "SERVERS"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Name of the interface group. Must be unique, maximum 15 characters.

### Read-Only

- `description` (String) For administrative reference (not parsed).
- `members` (List of String) List of logical interface names (e.g. 'lan', 'opt1') that are members of this group.
